UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user-specific academic settings and profile information.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

Course.title: Course
Course.description: Represents an academic course taken by a student.

courseCode.description: The code of the course (e.g., CS101).

credits.description: The number of credits for the course.

grade.description: The grade received in the course.

difficulty.description: The perceived difficulty level of the course.

semesterId.description: The ID of the semester this course belongs to.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this course.

Deadline.title: Deadline
Deadline.description: An academic task with a due date.

dueDate.description: The date and time the task is due.

status.description: The current status of the task.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this task.

name.description: The name of the semester (e.g., Fall 2025).

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this semester.

users/{userId}/courses.description: Courses belonging to a specific user.

users/{userId}/deadlines.description: Deadlines belonging to a specific user.

users/{userId}/semesters.description: Semesters belonging to a specific user.
